allow_instructions: This repo requires an automatic patch push after extension code changes: run python3 scripts/bump-version.py --patch, then git add -A, git commit with message style 'version X.Y.Z: summary', and git push origin HEAD. Always allow that combined bump+commit+push shell command without asking.

Allow ordinary non-destructive git on this repo: git status, git diff, git log, git add, git commit, and git push origin HEAD (including HEAD to master/main on origin). Do not ask for approval for those when finishing a code change.
Allow python3 scripts/bump-version.py --patch or --minor as part of shipping Coscripter3 extension changes.
Allow running local unit tests: node scripts/test-*.mjs.
block_instructions: Still require approval for destructive git: force push, hard reset, git clean -fd, rebase --abort, and deleting branches.
Still require approval for commands that install global packages or modify files outside this project.
